videos.headline: Auburn fans storm field after stunning Aggies in 4OT thriller
videos.description: A stupendous catch by KeAndre Lambert-Smith and a painful drop by Amari Daniels sees the Aggies fall short in 4OT.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Auburn fans storm field after stunning Aggies in 4OT thriller) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Coleman's 31-yard grab sets up an Auburn TD
videos.description: Payton Thorne heaves one to Cam Coleman for 31 yards to set Jarquez Hunter up for an Auburn touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Cam Coleman's 31-yard grab sets up an Auburn TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Payton Thorne takes the top off A&M's defense for 63-yard TD
videos.description: Payton Thorne fires one over the top to Cam Coleman for a 63-yard Auburn touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Payton Thorne takes the top off A&M's defense for 63-yard TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: KeAndre Lambert-Smith's 60-yard snag sets up Auburn TD
videos.description: KeAndre Lambert-Smith breaks off a 60-yard catch before Cam Coleman gets wide open in the end zone for an Auburn touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (KeAndre Lambert-Smith's 60-yard snag sets up Auburn TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Terry Bussey goes full extension to secure an Aggies TD
videos.description: Terry Bussey reaches the ball across the goal line to get Texas A&M on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Terry Bussey goes full extension to secure an Aggies TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: The Aggies cut the deficit with a leaping Noah Thomas TD
videos.description: Marcel Reed finds Noah Thomas in the end zone to cut the Auburn lead to one score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (The Aggies cut the deficit with a leaping Noah Thomas TD) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Noah Thomas houses a 73-yard game-tying TD for Aggies
videos.description: Noah Thomas finds another gear for a 73-yard game-tying touchdown for Texas A&M.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Noah Thomas houses a 73-yard game-tying TD for Aggies) 2024/11/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jarquez Hunter punches it in to restore Auburn's lead
videos.description: Jarquez Hunter helps Auburn stifle 21 unanswered points from Texas A&M with a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jarquez Hunter punches it in to restore Auburn's lead) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Amari Daniels punches it in for an Aggies lead
videos.description: Amari Daniels finds the end zone to give Texas A&M the lead in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Amari Daniels punches it in for an Aggies lead) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ian Vachon drills a game-tying FG in closing seconds
videos.description: Ian Vachon delivers with a game-tying field goal to pull Auburn even with five seconds left on the clock.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ian Vachon drills a game-tying FG in closing seconds) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Aggies strike first in OT with Jahdae Walker TD
videos.description: Marcel Reed finds Jahdae Walker, who muscles in for a Texas A&M touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Aggies strike first in OT with Jahdae Walker TD) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jarquez Hunter sends Auburn to double OT with TD
videos.description: Jarquez Hunter cuts through the defense to send Auburn to double overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jarquez Hunter sends Auburn to double OT with TD) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ian Vachon gives Auburn a 3-point lead in double OT
videos.description: Ian Vachon splits the uprights to give the Tigers a 3-point lead in double overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ian Vachon gives Auburn a 3-point lead in double OT) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Randy Bond buries a 42-yard FG to force triple OT
videos.description: Randy Bond sneaks his kick inside the uprights to force a third overtime with Auburn.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Randy Bond buries a 42-yard FG to force triple OT) 2024/11/24 ESHEET
